evidence-ac1-size-autofocus.png: AC1: Trade order form opens with the USD size input focused.
evidence-ac3-placeholder-state.png: AC3: Empty size input placeholder state is captured for constraint-placeholder validation.
evidence-ac5-empty-min-copy.png: AC5/AC6: Empty market order shows min-order submit copy and disables submit.
evidence-ac5-below-min-disabled.png: AC5/AC6: A $5 market amount keeps submit disabled with min-order copy.
evidence-ac5-valid-submit.png: AC5/AC6: A $15 market amount enables submit and restores Open Long ETH copy.
evidence-ac2-size-selected.png: AC2: Refocusing the numeric size input selects the full current value.
evidence-ac7-limit-autofocus.png: AC7: Switching to Limit focuses the limit price input.
evidence-ac16-leverage-keyboard.png: AC16: Leverage input select-on-focus works and ArrowUp/ArrowDown step by 1.
evidence-ac4-tab-order.png: AC4: Tab moves from size to token amount to amount slider in DOM order.
evidence-ac17-enter-submit-position.png: AC17: Enter submits a valid $15 market order, redirects to ETH market detail, and shows a live position without a stuck submitting toast.
evidence-ac8-add-margin-focused.png: AC8: Add margin modal opens with the margin amount input focused.
evidence-ac9-remove-margin-focused.png: AC9: Remove margin modal opens with the margin amount input focused.
evidence-ac10-tpsl-focused.png: AC10: TP/SL modal opens with the TP trigger price input focused.
evidence-ac11-close-position-focused.png: AC11: Close position modal opens with the Close Position button focused.
